items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, it feels soft and luxurious!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing and retro briefcase shape.
The large size looks cool and is perfect for shoulder carry.
Magnetic closure inside with a large capacity!
Three carrying styles: Handbag, Shoulder, and Crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a natural, French "laid-back" vibe!
Large model number 89353
Dimensions 34.5*27*14 (gift bag included)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, the calfskin is soft, smooth, and premium. The leather develops a beautiful patina over time!
Classic silhouette, iconic Anagram embossing, and a perfect blend of vintage and modern vibes.
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn crossbody, handheld, or shoulder; three ways to switch freely! The handheld look is professional for work, while crossbody gives a relaxed casual feel. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Item No. 89352 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box, gift bag)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of smooth nappa leather and patent calfskin with suede lining, the leather gets better with time!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing, full of retro and chic vibes!
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn on the shoulder, carried by hand, or crossbody; three styles to switch between! The handbag style is professional for commuting, while the crossbody gives a casual, relaxed look. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Small model number 89356 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box and gift bag included)

items.name_en: The iconic Baguette medium handbag features a flap design with FF magnetic closure. Lined with a zip pocket. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody. Mirror effect silver leather material. Decorated with FF embossed pattern. Palladium metal finish. Size 26cm 0191MM85
items.name_cn: The iconic Baguette medium handbag features a flap design with FF magnetic closure. Lined with a zip pocket. items.name_en: The new large size First is here!!
items.name_cn:
The new large size First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first Fendi bag under his direction, revolutionizing the previous silhouette. The metal trim, large Logo lock, and body design combine architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at a dinner party, and chic for a shoulder carry!
Large 127B108 Dimensions 32.5x15x23cm
Small 129B98 Dimensions 26x9.5x18cm

specs.rawTitle:
The new large size First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first Fendi bag under his direction, revolutionizing the previous silhouette. The metal trim, large Logo lock, and body design combine architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at a dinner party, and chic for a shoulder carry!
Large 127B108 Dimensions 32.5x15x23cm
Small 129B98 Dimensions 26x9.5x18cm

items.name_en: The new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning; I was instantly captivated by this crescent bag, and the premium feel is maxed out. It looks super good ✨ and elevates the look instantly. The best part is the bag shape!
items.name_cn:
The new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning; I was instantly captivated by this crescent bag, and the premium feel is maxed out. It looks super good ✨ and elevates the look instantly. The best part is the bag shape!
It's versatile: salty, sweet, for commuting, dates, crossbody, or shoulder, all look great. The capacity is perfect for daily use, and it pairs well with hoodies for a casual vibe. It's truly a versatile bag!
This bag also brings an effortless relaxed feel.
Specs: 21x24x5cm, moderate size.
Model: 120723

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~
